name: AlphaCore
notes: The public Bitstarter website identifies AlphaCore as the project behind SN91 and links AlphaCoreBittensor/alphacore. The AlphaCore marketing domain currently returns an origin error to simple probes, so the GitHub repository is the verified public source surface.
public_notes: Provider entry for the AlphaCore source repository linked from the live Bitstarter SN91 project page.
